summary: Core cleanup logic thoroughly tested with good TDD coverage; workflow structure and act integration validated. Major gaps: no explicit error handling tests (invalid JSON, missing files, bad CLI args), no tests for formatDeletionPlan output format, fixtures not visible (hardcoded EXPECTED values undermine confidence in correctness). Fragile regex YAML parser in workflow.test.ts, heavy beforeAll hook in harness.test.ts. Would catch regressions in main functionality but miss error paths, edge cases in CLI parsing, and input validation.
